name: @vaipakam/indexer
description: Vaipakam chain → D1 indexer + public read-API Cloudflare Worker (Stage 3 PR3 of the Worker split — see docs/DesignsAndPlans/Stage3WorkerSplitPlan.md). Cron-driven event scan: pulls Offer / Loan / VPFI / NFT lifecycle events into D1 round-robin per chain, plus a cancelled-offer retention prune. HTTP-fronted read-API (open CORS, T-041): /offers/{stats,active,recent,by-creator/:addr,:offerId} + /loans/{active,recent,stats,timeseries,by-lender/:addr,by-borrower/:addr,:loanId} + /activity + /claimables/:addr. Read-only — holds no signing keys; never serves user-facing writes.
